user_query: What outdoor activities has Andrew done other than hiking in nature?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/ Speaker[atom(content =~ "Andrew")]/Session[atom(content =~ "outdoor activities nature")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "outdoor activities") and not(atom(content =~ "hiking"))])
